summary: The session focused on the complexities of progress payments under the NSW HIA Lump Sum contract for homeowners building their dream homes. The user requested concise sections of an article covering various aspects of progress payments, including their calculation, importance of payment schedules, and the impact of the Security of Payment Act.
facts: The user requested a shorter version of an article about progress payments under the NSW HIA Lump Sum contract. The user asked for specific sections of the article to be written in less than 200 words. The user inquired about the importance of payment schedules in the progress payment process. The user sought information on calculating progress payments under the NSW HIA Lump Sum contract. The user requested details about the final progress claim and its importance. The user asked for a description of the standard progress payment schedule under the NSW HIA Lump Sum contract. The user requested information on the Security of Payment Act 1999 (NSW) and its impact on progress payment schedules.
